title: ampelocissus erioclada
intro: Ampelocissus erioclada, also known as the wild grape vine, is a species of flowering plant in the Vitaceae family, native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ampelocissus erioclada include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or oil, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to digestive issues.
